subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1911-09-13 in London
subcodes.first_line: Welcome! Welcome! The people of Iran are very pleased that I have come here. My coming here will foster friendship between Britain and Iran
subcodes.first_line_orig: خوش آمدید اهالی ایران بسیار مسرورند از اینکه من آمدم اینجا این
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @oneness; unity of religion, @suffering and imprisonment, @unity of governments; political unity, @Declaration; advent of the Bab, @The Holy Spirit
